text: Being here, I feel a mix of curiosity and anticipation. The first space is open and quiet, perhaps inviting contemplation or preparation for something about to happen. In the second space, vibrant colors and bold text stimulate my senses and intellect. I feel inspired, as if I am surrounded by ideas in motion—an environment dedicated to thought, learning, and invention. There is a sense of being both an observer and a participant in the unfolding of knowledge.
